messages.message: 'user' is assigned a value but never used.

source:
import { html, LitElement } from 'lit'; import { msg, str } from '@lit/localize'; import { setLocale, getLocale } from '../localization.js'; import { isLoggedIn, logout, getUserInfo } from '../utils/auth.js'; class NavBar extends LitElement { createRenderRoot() { return this; } _handleLogout(e) { e.preventDefault(); logout(); } render() { const loggedIn = isLoggedIn(); const user = getUserInfo(); return html`
StoryApp
${msg('Menu')}
    ${loggedIn ? html`
  • ${msg('Dashboard')}
  • ${msg('Tambah Story')}
  • ${msg('Profil Developer')}
    • ` : html`
  • ${msg('Masuk')}
  • ${msg('Daftar')}
    • `}
  • ${msg('Bahasa')} (${getLocale()})
    • this._localeChanged('id')} >Indonesia (ID)
    • this._localeChanged('en')} >English (EN)
    • this._localeChanged('es')} >Español (ES)
    • ${loggedIn ? html`
  • ${msg('Keluar')}
    • ` : ''}
`; } async _localeChanged(newLocale) { if (newLocale !== getLocale()) { try { await setLocale(newLocale); } catch (e) { console.error('Error changing locale', e); } } } } customElements.define('nav-bar', NavBar);
